items.name: Banjo
items.description:
I want to be a rock star, and travel really far, and buy / me a big expensive car. /
And make lots of money and find me a honey. /
And live in nice big house where it's sunny. /
With a pool and I'll be cool. /
I'll always have a gig cause I'll be big. /
I'll have parties and friends and places to go, /
The only problem is I play the banjo. - Ryan Shupe

items.name: Flying Carpet of Books
items.description: Reading can take you places. Literally. Books version of the magic carpet; click to activate. Using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or the arrow keys to control the direction it flies. Click again to hop off.
